title: Spicy Brazillian Chicken Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired dish featuring crispy fried chicken, served with a side of zesty sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
Marinate chicken pieces in spicy and brazillian seasoning for 30 minutes.
Dredge chicken pieces in flour before deep-frying in batches until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and set chicken aside.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add 2 tsp of spicy seasoning to the pan and sauté for 1 minute.
Add 2 tbsp of brazillian spice mix to the pan and sauté for another minute.
Serve crispy fried chicken with a side of zesty sauce, made by mixing 2 tbsp of soy sauce and 1 tbsp of lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
